banner.title: Your Safety Matters
banner.message: We are committed to keeping Second Marriage a safe and respectful space for everyone.

resources.title: Community Rules
resources.subtitle: Read our community standards and guidelines.

resources.title: Privacy Settings
resources.subtitle: Control who sees your profile and activity.

tips: Never share personal contact details such as phone number, email, or address before meeting in person and establishing genuine trust.
Always meet for the first time in a public, well-populated place and let a trusted friend or family member know your plans.
Be wary of anyone who asks for money, gifts, or financial information. This is a serious red flag regardless of the reason given.
Trust your instincts. If something feels wrong or a profile seems too good to be true, stop communication immediately.
Use the in-app messaging system instead of moving to external apps until you are fully comfortable with the person.
Verify a match's identity with a video call before meeting in person to confirm they are who they say they are.

emergency.title: In Case of Emergency
emergency.message: If you are in immediate danger, please contact your local emergency services. Do not hesitate to reach out to our support team at any time.

header.title: Our Community Standards
header.message: These rules ensure a safe, respectful space for everyone seeking a second chance at love.

rules.title: Honesty & Authenticity
rules.description: Provide accurate information about yourself. False profiles, fake photos, or misleading details are strictly prohibited and will result in immediate removal.

rules.title: Serious Intent Only
rules.description: This platform is exclusively for individuals seeking a second marriage. Casual dating, friendship requests, or non-matrimonial intentions are not permitted.

rules.title: Respect & Dignity
rules.description: Treat every member with respect regardless of their background, religion, or ethnicity. Harassment, hate speech, and discriminatory behaviour are not tolerated.

rules.title: Privacy Protection
rules.description: Do not share personal contact information in public areas. Sharing another member's private information without consent is prohibited.

rules.title: Appropriate Photos
rules.description: Upload only clear, recent, and appropriate photos of yourself. Obscene, offensive, or stolen photos are forbidden and subject to removal.

rules.title: No Scams or Fraud
rules.description: Any attempt to deceive members for financial gain, emotional manipulation, or fraudulent activity will result in a permanent ban and may be reported to authorities.

rules.title: Child Safety
rules.description: Members must be 25 years or older. Any content that endangers minors is strictly prohibited. Violations will be reported to law enforcement.

rules.title: Compliance with Laws
rules.description: All members must comply with local laws and regulations. The platform reserves the right to cooperate with law enforcement when required.

communityRules.footerNote: Violations of community rules will result in warnings, temporary suspension, or permanent removal depending on severity. Our moderation team reviews all reports within 24 hours.
